headlines.description: Thunder wing Jalen Williams, who has been hampered by injuries all season, will not play in Saturday's Game 7 against the Spurs.

headlines.headline: 76ers tab Cavs GM Mike Gansey to lead basketball operations
headlines.description: Cleveland Cavaliers general manager Mike Gansey finalized a multiyear deal to become the new president of basketball operations for the Philadelphia 76ers, his agent, Bret Just of WME Basketball, told ESPN on Friday.

headlines.headline: 'Not an Unc yet': Why Lamar Jackson doesn't feel old
headlines.description: With a new coach and new OC, Jackson said the start of this season is a "breath of fresh air."

headlines.headline: Falcons president Matt Ryan's hands-on approach a hit in Atlanta
headlines.description: Falcons players and coaches are praising Ryan's active role and leadership as the team's new executive.

headlines.headline: Steelers' O-line shuffle an attempt to protect Aaron Rodgers
headlines.description: Is Troy Fautanu moving from the right side to his left? More about how flexibility will aid the line and QB.

headlines.headline: Giants' Carter, Dart express unity after disagreement over Trump
headlines.description: Giants teammates Jaxson Dart and Abdul Carter expressed solidarity Friday following their "disagreement" over the quarterback's involvement in an event for President Donald Trump.

headlines.headline: Giants fear WR Gunner Olszewski has torn Achilles, sources say
headlines.description: Giants wide receiver Gunner Olszewski went down during OTAs with a noncontact injury that the team fears is a torn Achilles tendon, sources told ESPN.

headlines.headline: Lions' Joseph, Branch, LaPorta 'all improving' after season-ending injuries
headlines.description: Dan Campbell said he is focused on bringing the trio along slowly as they recover from injury this offseason.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Hurricanes the favorite over Golden Knights to take home the Cup

headlines.headline: Hurricanes favored over Golden Knights in Stanley Cup Final
headlines.description: Having finally gotten over the conference finals hump, the Hurricanes are favored over the Golden Knights as they head into their first Stanley Cup Final since 2006.

headlines.headline: Canes' Andersen plays with heavy heart after Lemieux's death
headlines.description: Hurricanes goaltender Frederik Andersen played with a heavy heart in Friday's Game 5 victory over the Canadiens after his agent, Claude Lemieux, died by suicide Thursday.

headlines.headline: Everett sets up Memorial Cup final against Kitchener
headlines.description: The Everett Silvertips beat the Chicoutimi Sagueneens 6-1 in the Memorial Cup to advance to face Kitchener in the championship game.
